items.title: Danish Public Sector AI Governance Failure
items.summary: Danish public institutions fail at AI governance from fragmented decision authority, not lack of regulation. Why power clarity matters most.

items.title: Pharma Lessons for EU AI Act
items.summary: The EU AI Act mirrors pharma's compliance model. GxP validation, change control, and human oversight. Pharma managers already know how to run AI governance.

items.title: Programme Managers Are the Most Important Hire
items.summary: AI governance needs a Chief AI Officer or governance specialist. Wrong. What you need first is a programme manager who can manage 50+ deliverables.

items.title: Phased AI Governance Programme
items.summary: Complex transformations succeed when structured in phases with clear exit criteria. Here's the four-phase AI governance model that delivers results.

items.title: AI Infrastructure Timing Problem
items.summary: AI has become operational infrastructure in financial systems. Tools fail in isolation. Infrastructure cannot. Why governance cannot keep pace with AI speed.

items.title: Human Oversight: Not a Rubber Stamp
items.summary: Article 14 of the EU AI Act requires human oversight. Most organizations interpret it as passive observation. Here's what it actually means.

items.title: Cost of AI Governance Inaction
items.summary: The cost of doing nothing about AI governance exceeds the cost of building it by 5-10x. Fines, remediation, lost deals, and talent costs add up fast.

items.title: Shadow AI: Hidden Compliance Risk
items.summary: Most organizations think they're running 3–5 AI systems. The actual number is usually 15–50. Here's how shadow AI happens and how to find it.

items.title: 5 Signs You Aren't Ready for EU AI Act
items.summary: Five clear signs your organization lacks AI governance foundations. And what to do about each one. Five months until the deadline. You still have time.

items.title: AI Governance Starter Kit
items.summary: Most organizations skip the hard work. Here's the actual 4-step starter kit for AI governance before you hire someone or wait for guidance.
